title: Password Hashing, Verification, and Upgrade · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent team receives different assets, adversaries, data sizes, cryptoperiods, interoperability duties, availability limits, and compliance claims and transfers password hashing, verification, and upgrade into a new versioned password credential verifier. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of versioned password credential verifier with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Store password verifiers with a slow password-hashing construction rather than plaintext, reversible encryption, or fast general hashes.
Select and encode Argon2id memory, time, parallelism, salt, and output parameters from current guidance and measured service budgets.
Choose scrypt or PBKDF2 only from explicit availability and compliance constraints with current calibrated parameters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Password Hash Not Encrypt
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab cryptographic engineering team handles case 3779 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to admit a versioned password verifier, bound KDF work, and select verify-then-rehash migration; retain exact canonical bytes, purpose, role, version, and artifact identity; then repeat or roll back a nonce, sequence, or key version and reject the stale state. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Password Hash Not Encrypt.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for store password verifiers with a slow password-hashing construction rather than plaintext, reversible encryption, or fast general hashes. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Password Hash Not Encrypt, keep Crypto Go Password Hash Not Encrypt connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
